title: Hollings Treat Strips with Beef Dog Training Treats, 100% Natural, Air Dried Beef Strips for Adult Dogs, Gluten Free & High in Protein (100g)
features: HOLLINGS TRAINING TREATS - Discover our delicious bites and sticks to help reward good behaviour. Training is an integral part of any dog & owner partnership, and what better way to show that trust and commitment than through our delicious, 100% natural bites and chews

PROVIDES ENERGY & SUPPORTS STRONG MUSCLES - These chewy beef strips are simply air dried to lock in the natural goodness and will keep your dog occupied the natural way. Beef also provides essential amino acids and nutrients which provides energy and helps support strong muscles.

100% GLUTEN FREE & HIGH IN PROTEIN - Our Treat Strips with Beef are 100% gluten free and made with the highest quality ingredients. Not only this, but these meaty treats are also a great source of protein for your dog.

A COMPLEMENTARY PET FOOD FOR ADULT DOGS OF ALL BREEDS - Treat your dog to something they will love to chew on - our treat strips are great to use as a natural treat or reward. These treats are not suitable for puppies, dogs with poor teeth or elderly dogs.

GIFTS FROM NATURE - Hollings natural dogs treats are made from 100% natural ingredients and are loved by dogs and owners alike. Established over 40 years ago, we are committed to offer the highest quality naturally healthy treats.
